offer: For accounting firms managing 10–20 SaaS subscriptions/month, budget overruns cause cash flow gaps. We provide tracking instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking and managing SaaS subscription costs effectively.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums sharing tools for accounting firms
try_it: Let users try monthly spend tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
